basics.name: Julien Pireaud
basics.address: 1270 SW Hannah St, Pullman, WA 99163, USA

profiles.label: Applied Science / Data Systems
profiles.summary: Software engineer with 15+ years of experience building production software across data pipelines, scientific computing, backend services, and C++/mobile systems. Recent work includes Python-based event-driven pipelines on AWS for wearable health data, Parquet transformation workflows, ML-oriented scoring jobs, and HPC command-line simulation tooling for research. Strong debugging discipline, systems thinking, and a correctness-focused approach to software used for real-world decisions.

bullets: Designed a Python and AWS pipeline to collect Apple Watch study data on charging events and transform raw sensor feeds into analysis-ready Parquet datasets.
Built Django REST and event-driven workflows across S3, Lambda, and SQS to preprocess uploads, orchestrate scoring jobs, and deliver near-real-time health feedback.
Collaborated with Prof. Larry Holder on ML-driven score computation and interpretation for geolocation, motion, heart-rate, and behavior signals.
Evaluated serverless and containerized execution models, improving recovery, observability, and debugging for long-running distributed jobs.
Refactored a legacy Windows MFC simulator into a reusable C++ library and command-line tool for HPC runs against climate prediction datasets.
Improved correctness and reproducibility by moving analytical workflows from spreadsheet and R-based processes into compiled code used in scientific research.
Supported large batch simulations, performance tuning, and interpretable outputs for domain collaborators on colony survival modeling.
Delivered software projects spanning Python and Django backends, SvelteKit dashboards, and cloud-integrated workflows for data-driven products.
Designed maintainable API and storage integrations using AWS and Firebase while balancing rapid delivery with long-term operability.
Led production iOS work for magicplan while contributing shared C++ core libraries used across platforms.
Improved stability, performance, and release quality for a product used by more than 20 million users.
Developed C++ tools for FBX and Maya pipelines and supported customers integrating middleware into production game workflows.
Improved Unreal Engine integration for navigation and character systems in performance-sensitive environments.

profiles.label: iOS / Product Engineering
profiles.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience in iOS development, C++ systems, and full-stack engineering. Proven track record building and scaling mobile applications used by millions of users. Strong expertise in Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, Objective-C, and C++. Experienced in performance optimization, cross-platform architecture, and backend integration using AWS, Django, and Firebase.

bullets: Developed iOS applications using Swift and SwiftUI with iCloud synchronization.
Built AR features using RealityKit.
Built dashboards using Svelte and SvelteKit.
Designed backend systems using Django, Firebase, and AWS.
Led development of an iOS cognitive health platform.
Built real-time data pipelines using Django and AWS.
Managed cross-functional teams.
Built high-performance C++ simulation tools.
Refactored an MFC application into a command-line bee population dynamics simulator for HPC environments.
Optimized scientific models by migrating workflows from Excel and R to C++.
Worked on React and Spring Boot applications.
Led iOS development for magicplan, used by more than 20 million users.
Built cross-platform C++ core libraries.
Improved application stability and performance.
Developed C++ tools for FBX and Maya pipelines.
Supported game customers integrating HumanIK and Kynapse middleware.
Improved Kynapse Unreal Engine integration for BioShock Infinite skyline systems.
Built PHP and MySQL applications.
Delivered custom software across mobile, web, and backend projects.
Built iOS applications, Svelte dashboards, and cloud-backed integrations for clients.
Designed maintainable architectures using Swift, Django, Firebase, and AWS.
Led engineering across mobile and backend systems for a cognitive health platform.
Built data collection and processing workflows using Django and AWS.
Worked across product delivery, infrastructure decisions, and team coordination.
Built high-performance C++ simulation tools for scientific workloads.
Refactored a legacy MFC application into a command-line bee population dynamics simulator for HPC environments.
Optimized analytical workflows by migrating spreadsheet and R-based steps into compiled tooling.
Led iOS development for magicplan, used by more than 20 million users.
Built cross-platform C++ core libraries.
Improved application stability and performance.
Developed C++ tools for FBX and Maya pipelines.
Supported game customers integrating HumanIK and Kynapse middleware.
Improved Unreal Engine integration for large production workflows.
Built PHP and MySQL applications.
